caption: A person's hand reaches toward several stacks of trading card boxes. The boxes are predominantly black and grey with the words "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and the year "2020" printed on them. A large, stylized orange and black logo reading "GASPY'S CASEBREAKS." is overlaid at the bottom of the scene. In the background, a smaller inset window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt sitting in a room with equipment, including a computer monitor and speakers. Across the sequence, the person's hand moves closer to the center of the frame, partially obscuring the boxes as it enters the shot. A small watermark reading "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible near the center of the screen. The environment is brightly lit, focusing on the merchandise and the individual performing the action.
